description: Layered task instructions with progressive ambiguity (L0-L3)

levels.L0: Precise instruction - includes all execution-level parameters, no ambiguity
levels.L1: Environment-disambiguated - missing elements (e.g., app name) but only one option in context
levels.L2: Parameter-underspecified - clear goal but missing key information at decision points
levels.L3: Intent-level ambiguity - describes 'what is wanted' rather than 'what to do'

parameters.name: Emma Lopez
